== Notes for [[Item:Q109312|Q109312]] ==

Source: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Urwah_ibn_Mas%27ud
--------------------
Source 1: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/%E2%80%98Urwah_bin_Mas%E2%80%98ud

Source 2: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Layla_bint_Abi_Murrah_al-Thaqafi

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
